products.name: StreamCaster LITE 5200 (SL5200)
products.descriptor: Ultra-low SWaP OEM MANET radio module for unmanned systems

evidence.snippet:
STREAMCASTER LITE 5200 (SL5200)
-------------------------------
![](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Silvus_OEM_KeyArt_R2_smwSL5200.png)
#### **SL5200 OEM MODULE**
#### **THE POWER TO PERFORM**
Designed for today’s leading-edge [unmanned systems](https://silvustechnologies.com/applications/unmanned-systems/), the SL5200 delivers the performance of StreamCaster MANET radios in an ultra-low SWaP OEM module.

![NDAA compliance icon standard size](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/NDAA-Compliant-Icon.jpg)
[![Blue UAS Certification Icon](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Blue-UAS-Icon.jpg)](https://bluelist.appsplatformportals.us/Framework/)[![Green UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Green-UAS-Certification-Mark.png)](https://www.auvsi.org/certification-training/green-uas/clearned-list/)

products.name: StreamCaster 4200 Enhanced Plus (SC4200EP)
products.descriptor: 2×2 MIMO tactical MANET radio in rugged handheld and OEM form factors

evidence.snippet:
#### **2X2 MIMO RADIO**
_Portability meets performance._
SC4200EP is a 2×2 MIMO radio, delivering best-in-class performance and efficiency in a miniature package. It is ideal for use in portable and embedded applications where size, weight, power or cost are key.
Blue UAS Framework Certified – SC4200EP is NDAA and DoD cybersecurity compliant, and is approved for use in conjunction with Blue UAS platforms.

products.name: SC4200+ Drop-In Module
products.descriptor: Plug-and-play 2×2 MIMO MANET radio module for integration into platform subsystems

evidence.snippet: Blue UAS Framework Certified – SC4200EP is NDAA and DoD cybersecurity compliant, and is approved for use in conjunction with Blue UAS platforms.

*   Available in 4 form factors to suit a variety of applications:
    *   Rugged “brick” (externally powered)
    *   Rugged handheld (w/ twist-lock battery connector)
    *   Non-rugged OEM Module (for embedding in custom products and subsystems)
    *   Drop-in Module (plug-and-play integration into platform subsystems)

products.notes: SC4200P-DP drop-in form factor of the SC4200EP product family.

products.name: StreamCaster 4400 Enhanced (SC4400E)
products.descriptor: 4×4 MIMO MANET radio for fixed, vehicular, and airborne high-power applications

evidence.snippet:
STREAMCASTER 4400 _ENHANCED_ (SC4400E)
--------------------------------------
#### **4X4 MIMO RADIO**
_With great power comes great capability._
SC4400E delivers the power of 4×4 MIMO in a ruggedized package. SC4400E is ideal for use in fixed infrastructure, vehicular, long range, and airborne applications where maximum performance is desired.

![NDAA compliance certification icon](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/NDAA-Compliant-Icon.png)
[![Blue UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/BLUEUASFull-Color.png)](https://bluelist.appsplatformportals.us/Framework/)[![Green UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Green-UAS-Certification-Mark.png)](https://www.auvsi.org/cleared-list)

products.name: StreamCaster 4400 XTREME (SC4400X)
products.descriptor: Ultra-ruggedized corrosion-resistant 4×4 MIMO MANET radio for harsh environments

evidence.snippet:
STREAMCASTER 4400 _XTREME_ ([SC4400X](#sc4400x))
------------------------------------------------
#### Rugged Environment MANET Radio Built For Harsh Conditions
Delivering the proven performance of the StreamCaster 4400 MANET radio with up to 20 Watts of output power (80W effective performance, thanks to [TX Eigen Beamforming](https://youtu.be/2UJPrXAhmDw)) in an ultra-ruggedized, corrosion-resistant form factor.

![NDAA compliance certification icon](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/NDAA-Compliant-Icon.png)
[![Blue UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/BLUEUASFull-Color.png)](https://bluelist.appsplatformportals.us/Framework/)[![Green UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Green-UAS-Certification-Mark.png)](https://www.auvsi.org/cleared-list)

products.name: StreamCaster MINI 5200 (SM5200)
products.descriptor: Ultra-compact 2×2 MIMO rugged MANET radio for dismounted operators

evidence.snippet:
STREAMCASTER MINI 5200 (SM5200)
-------------------------------
![](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/SM5200-News-Release-Graphic.jpg)
#### ADAPTIVE TO YOUR MISSION

**Ultra-Compact, Battle-Proven Power**
At just 182 grams, the SM5200 integrates high-speed 2×2 MIMO radio performance into an extremely low-SWaP form factor. Powered by our battle-proven MN-MIMO waveform, it delivers high-fidelity video, voice, and data across a self-forming, adaptive mesh network. Built for the most contested environments, the SM5200 provides:
*   **Massive Scalability:** Seamlessly connects 550+ nodes

products.name: FASST 6000 Spectrum Sensor
products.descriptor: Low-SWaP handheld RF spectrum sensor with SIGINT direction-finding for the tactical edge

evidence.snippet:
Silvus Technologies Introduces the FASST™ 6000 Spectrum Sensor
--------------------------------------------------------------
#### Delivering Powerful RF Spectrum Intelligence and Geolocation to the Tactical Edge
![](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/FASST6000_KeyArt_4-13-copy.webp)
_New low-SWaP spectrum sensor delivers industry-leading 144.5 THz/s spectrum scanning, redefining the benchmark for mobile SIGINT, EW and distributed RF sensing operations_

products.notes: Announced April 30 2026; product page (silvustechnologies.com/fasst-sensors/fasst-6000) was skipped_class_budget; evidence from press release only.

products.name: StreamCaster TRINITY Dual Band MIMO Transceiver Array
products.descriptor: Triplex dual-band sector antenna array with integrated SC4400E radios for 360° mesh coverage

evidence.snippet: StreamCaster TRINITY delivers high bandwidth, long-range mesh network communications in any environment. Featuring a unique Trilobe design, each of StreamCaster TRINITY’s three, high-gain 12 dbi sector antennas provide 120° of coverage, extending the area of operation for manned/unmanned air and ground assets. Use them independently or together to achieve up to 360° of coverage.

![NDAA compliance certification icon](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/NDAA-Compliant-Icon.png)
[![Blue UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/BLUEUASFull-Color.png)](https://bluelist.appsplatformportals.us/Framework/)[![Green UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Green-UAS-Certification-Mark.png)](https://www.auvsi.org/cleared-list)

products.name: StreamCaster PRISM Antenna Radio Systems
products.descriptor: Modular precision sectorized MIMO antenna-radio system for long-range area coverage

evidence.snippet:
The StreamCaster PRISM family of modular Precision Integrated Sectorized MIMO antenna radio systems provide long-range sectorized coverage across wide areas of operation. Designed for tactical operations, at-the-halt and fixed infrastructure applications, StreamCaster PRISM’s ruggedized construction and toolless set-up enables it to be rapidly deployed for operational flexibility.
The StreamCaster PRISM is JETDAS designated as Model AN/TSC-248(v)1.

![NDAA compliance certification icon](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/NDAA-Compliant-Icon.png)
[![Blue UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/BLUEUASFull-Color.png)](https://bluelist.appsplatformportals.us/Framework/)[![Green UAS Certified Badge](https://silvustechnologies.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Green-UAS-Certification-Mark.png)](https://www.auvsi.org/cleared-list)

products.name: StreamCaster NEXUS
products.descriptor: Chest-mounted tactical networking system pairing SM5200 MANET radio with Samsung EUD

evidence.snippet:
NEXT GENERATION TACTICAL NETWORKING SYSTEM For the dismounted operator
----------------------------------------------------------------------
Purpose-built for the dismounted operator, StreamCaster NEXUS seamlessly pairs the ultra-slim SM5200 MANET radio with Samsung’s mission-ready EUD to deliver mission-critical connectivity and real-time situational awareness at the tactical edge. Custom designed Juggernaut chest-mount features streamlined, snag-free cable routing that minimizes weight and maximizes operator freedom.

products.name: StreamScape GUI & ATAK Plugin
products.descriptor: Network management GUI and ATAK plugin embedded in every StreamCaster radio

evidence.snippet:
#### POWERFUL NETWORK MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE
Embedded in every StreamCaster radio, and accessible from virtually any computer, laptop, tablet, or smartphone.
*   **Network Topology Page:** An intuitive graphical illustration of signal strengths and congestion across the network.

products.name: StreamConnect: Global Ad Hoc Network
products.descriptor: Software bridging MANET mesh with Internet and Satcom for beyond-line-of-sight connectivity

evidence.snippet:
### **StreamConnect: Global Ad Hoc Network**
Silvus’ StreamConnect: Global Ad Hoc Network is an adaptable data transport technology that seamlessly integrates Mobile Ad-hoc Networking (MANET) with Internet capabilities to connect teams operating anywhere with a 5G, Satcom, or other internet source.

products.name: StreamLC
products.descriptor: Push-to-talk software for Android and Windows devices on StreamCaster MANET networks

evidence.snippet: With StreamLC, you can bring Push-to-Talk (PTT) capability to any Android® or Windows® device connected to your StreamCaster MANET Network. Additionally, StreamLC extends PTT functions wirelessly for covert operations, provides PTT capability to multiple operators throughout a headquarters facility, or remotes PTT capability around the world via Internet/VPN access.

unresolved_questions: FASST 6000 product page (silvustechnologies.com/fasst-sensors/fasst-6000) was skipped_class_budget; NDAA and Blue UAS compliance status could not be confirmed from the press release alone.
SM5200 (StreamCaster MINI 5200) NDAA and Blue UAS compliance not stated on its product page; likely a newly launched product without certification yet.
SC4200+ Drop-In Module compliance page (resources/downloads/sc4200p-drop-in-module) was skipped_class_budget; NDAA/Blue UAS status derived from parent SC4200EP product page claim.
StreamCaster NEXUS system-level NDAA/Blue UAS status not stated on the NEXUS product page; underlying SM5200 radio compliance also unconfirmed.

fetch_requests.reason: Product page for FASST 6000 Spectrum Sensor — needed to confirm NDAA/Blue UAS compliance and full product specs; current evidence is only a press release.
Product/downloads page for SC4200+ Drop-In Module — needed to confirm product-specific NDAA/Blue UAS compliance independent of the parent SC4200EP page.
